# Copilot Instructions

This repository contains a Next.js frontend and a Node.js API for a project and team task management platform.

- Prefer small, focused changes that preserve the current app structure.
- Keep authentication based on JWT and role-based authorization.
- Keep the UI responsive, accessible, and practical for admin, project manager, and team member workflows.
- Update the README and docs when adding user-facing behavior or API changes.
- Use PostgreSQL-compatible Prisma schema changes for persistent data modeling.
